items.title: NRC Targets Faster Nuclear Licensing With NEPA Streamlining Proposal
items.blurb: The Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has proposed a major rewrite of its National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) rules, opening yet another front in the agency’s fast-moving campaign to modernize as directed by a…

items.title: Sizewell B lifetime extension terms agreed to 2055
items.blurb: The UK's Sizewell B nuclear power plant is set to get a 20-year lifetime extension after terms were agreed by the UK government and operator EDF.

items.title: Deep Fission receives prototype reactor canister
items.blurb: California-based startup Deep Fission, which aims to place small modular reactors in boreholes a mile underground, has announced the delivery of its prototype reactor canister for its pilot project to the Parsons site…
